sentences.arabic: النِّيَّةُ الصَّالِحَةُ شَرْطٌ لِقَبُولِ الْأَعْمَالِ عِنْدَ اللهِ.
sentences.translation: Iskrena namjera je uslov za primanje djela kod Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: A righteous intention is a condition for actions to be accepted by Allah.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «إِنَّمَا الْأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ بَدْءِ الْوَحْيِ، حَدِيثُ ١].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: 'Djela se vrjednuju prema namjerama' [Buhari].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) said: 'Actions are but by intentions' [Bukhari].

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يَكُونَ مُخْلِصًا فِي عِبَادَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Musliman mora biti iskren u svom ibadetu.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim must be sincere in his worship.

sentences.arabic: الْإِخْلَاصُ يَعْنِي أَنَّكَ تَعْمَلُ الْخَيْرَ لِوَجْهِ اللهِ فَقَطْ.
sentences.translation: Ihlas (iskrenost) znači da činiš dobro samo radi Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: Sincerity means that you do good only for the sake of Allah.

sentences.arabic: بِدُونِ نِيَّةٍ صَادِقَةٍ، لَا يَكُونُ لِلْعَمَلِ قِيمَةٌ عِنْدَ اللهِ.
sentences.translation: Bez iskrene namjere, djelo nema vrijednost kod Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: Without a sincere intention, an action has no value with Allah.
